name: Overnight Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar with melted butter in a bowl.
2. Sift flour and baking powder into another bowl.
3. Add eggs to the sugar and butter mixture, mixing well.
4. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture and vanilla extract to the wet ingredients, stirring until combined.
5. Divide the dough into four portions.
6. To each portion, add:
- 1/2 cup shredded coconut
- 1/4 cup peanut butter or chopped nuts
- 1/2 cup dates
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon and nutmeg
7. Roll out each portion of dough separately on wax paper or shape into molds.
8. Chill the rolled dough in the refrigerator for several hours, preferably overnight.
9. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius).
10. Slice the chilled dough into cookies using a knife or sharp blade.
11. Bake for 7-10 minutes until lightly golden.
Mrs. James W. Wilson
